# Pysheeet — Python Cheat Sheets

> Comprehensive Python cheat sheets covering core language, data structures, networking, databases, async, CLI, testing, data science, web development, and more.

## Core Python
- [Python Basics](/basic/python-basic) — Syntax, operators, control flow, comprehensions
- [Type Hints](/basic/python-typing) — Type annotations, generic types, Protocols, TypedDict
- [Classes & OOP](/basic/python-object) — Inheritance, magic methods, descriptors, MRO, properties
- [Functions](/basic/python-func) — *args/**kwargs, decorators, closures, annotations, singledispatch
- [Data Structures](/basic/python-dict) — dict, list, set, heap with practical patterns
- [Generators](/basic/python-generator) — Generator functions, yield from, async generators, context managers
- [Itertools](/basic/python-itertools) — Infinite iterators, combinatorics, grouping, sliding windows, chaining
- [Collections](/basic/python-collections) — namedtuple, deque, Counter, defaultdict, OrderedDict, ChainMap
- [Functools](/basic/python-functools) — partial, lru_cache, cache, singledispatch, wraps, reduce
- [Dataclasses](/basic/python-dataclasses) — @dataclass, field, frozen, __post_init__, InitVar, inheritance
- [Profiling](/basic/python-profiling) — cProfile, timeit, memory_profiler, line_profiler, py-spy, optimization
- [Regular Expressions](/basic/python-rexp) — Pattern matching, groups, lookahead, substitution, flags
- [Unicode](/basic/python-unicode) — Encoding, normalization, string vs bytes, codecs

## System Programming
- [Pathlib](/os/python-pathlib) — Modern path manipulation, globbing, file operations
- [Logging](/os/python-logging) — Log levels, handlers, formatting, dictConfig, structured logging
- [OS Interfaces](/os/python-os) — Process management, environment, filesystem, platform info
- [Date/Time](/os/python-date) — datetime, timezone, formatting, parsing, timedelta
- [File I/O](/os/python-io) — Reading/writing files, streams, binary data, text encoding

## CLI & Command-Line Tools
- [Argparse](/cli/python-argparse) — Positional/optional args, subparsers, mutually exclusive groups
- [Click](/cli/python-click) — Commands, options, prompts, groups, callbacks, echo styling

## Concurrency
- [Threading](/concurrency/python-threading) — Threads, locks, queues, GIL, producer-consumer
- [Multiprocessing](/concurrency/python-multiprocessing) — Processes, pools, shared memory, pipes, managers
- [Futures](/concurrency/python-futures) — ThreadPoolExecutor, ProcessPoolExecutor, as_completed

## Asyncio
- [Async Guide](/asyncio/python-asyncio-guide) — Coroutines, event loop, tasks, understanding async/await
- [Async Basics](/asyncio/python-asyncio-basic) — asyncio.run, create_task, gather, wait, timeouts
- [Async Servers](/asyncio/python-asyncio-server) — TCP/UDP servers, streams, protocol classes
- [Async Advanced](/asyncio/python-asyncio-advanced) — Semaphores, queues, graceful shutdown, subprocess

## Network Programming
- [Socket Basics](/network/python-socket) — Address resolution, byte order, TCP/UDP client/server
- [Socket Servers](/network/python-socket-server) — select, poll, epoll, ThreadingTCPServer
- [Async Sockets](/network/python-socket-async) — Non-blocking I/O, async socket operations
- [SSL/TLS](/network/python-socket-ssl) — TLS servers/clients, mutual TLS, context creation
- [SSH](/network/python-ssh) — paramiko, SSH clients, key management, tunneling
- [Packet Sniffer](/network/python-socket-sniffer) — Raw sockets, packet capture, protocol parsing

## Database
- [SQLAlchemy Basics](/database/python-sqlalchemy) — Engine, connections, transactions, raw SQL
- [SQLAlchemy ORM](/database/python-sqlalchemy-orm) — Models, relationships, sessions, eager loading
- [SQLAlchemy Query](/database/python-sqlalchemy-query) — Joins, subqueries, aggregation, filtering patterns

## Web Development
- [FastAPI](/web/python-fastapi) — Routes, Pydantic models, dependency injection, async, background tasks, WebSocket

## Testing
- [Pytest](/testing/python-pytest) — Fixtures, parametrize, tmp_path, monkeypatch, raises, warns
- [Unittest Mock](/testing/python-unittest-mock) — patch, Mock/MagicMock, AsyncMock, mock_open, autospec

## Security
- [Cryptography](/security/python-crypto) — AES-GCM, RSA, ECDSA, Argon2, key derivation
- [TLS/SSL](/security/python-tls) — Certificate verification, context configuration, best practices
- [Vulnerabilities](/security/python-vulnerability) — SQL injection, timing attacks, XSS, secure coding

## C/C++ Extensions
- [ctypes](/extension/python-ctypes) — Shared library loading, type mapping, callback functions
- [C API](/extension/python-capi) — Module creation, reference counting, exception handling
- [Modern Extensions](/extension/python-cext-modern) — pybind11, Cython, cffi comparisons
- [C++ from Python](/extension/cpp-from-python) — pybind11 classes, STL binding, NumPy integration

## LLM & Machine Learning
- [PyTorch](/llm/pytorch) — Tensors, autograd, DataLoader, model training, distributed
- [Megatron](/llm/megatron) — Model parallelism, tensor parallelism, pipeline parallelism
- [LLM Serving](/llm/llm-serving) — vLLM, SGLang, continuous batching, PagedAttention
- [LLM Benchmarking](/llm/llm-bench) — Throughput, latency, TPS metrics, A/B testing

## High-Performance Computing
- [Slurm](/hpc/slurm) — Job submission, resource allocation, array jobs, GPU scheduling
- [Ray](/hpc/ray) — Distributed tasks, actors, object store, cluster management

## Data Science
- [NumPy](/data-science/python-numpy) — Array creation, broadcasting, linear algebra, random, indexing
- [Pandas](/data-science/python-pandas) — DataFrame, groupby, merge/join, pivot, missing data, datetime

## Appendix
- [Walrus Operator](/appendix/python-walrus) — := assignment expressions, comprehensions, gotchas
- [Python GDB](/appendix/python-gdb) — Debugging CPython with GDB, pretty-printers, core dumps
- [Disaggregated Prefill/Decode](/appendix/disaggregated-prefill-decode) — LLM inference architecture
- [Megatron EFA Monitoring](/appendix/megatron-efa-monitoring) — EFA metrics, NCCL diagnostics
- [NCCL GIN](/appendix/nccl-gin) — NCCL configuration, GIN overrides for distributed training
- [NVSHMEM Multi-NIC](/appendix/nvshmem-multi-nic) — Multi-NIC configuration for GPU communication

## Core Resources
- [What's New in Python 3](/python-new-py3) — New features by version (3.0-3.13)
- [Interview Cheatsheet](/interview/) — Question-indexed map into all cheatsheet sections
